raw.message: Choose a PlayStation Plus plan that gives you more of what you love.

hook.summary: Iconic PlayStation branding transitions into a high-energy game montage.
hook.visual_action: The PlayStation logo appears on a blue gradient, followed by rapid cuts of game characters inside dynamic blue frames.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Put 'em up to the sky, put 'em up, put 'em up

scene_flow: PlayStation logo intro on a signature blue background.
Fast-paced montage of various game characters and action sequences within stylized blue geometric overlays.
Text transition highlighting the value proposition: 'MEMBERS GET MORE'.
Final call to action screen urging users to 'REJOIN TODAY' with PlayStation Plus branding.
on_screen_text: Content and subscription features vary by tier, over time and region / country. Age restrictions & terms apply.
audience_proxy: Core console gamers and former PlayStation Plus subscribers interested in premium gaming content.
